response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale cloud infrastructure or distributed systems leadership; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute platform ownership or C++-centric systems design, making them a poor fit for the core technical requirements.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Proven experience mentoring and creating educational content
Active open-source contributions and infrastructure automation experience
concerns: Only minimal C++ exposure (LabWindows/CVI), far below 8-year requirement
No demonstrable experience with cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale
Lacks leadership experience in cloud/DevOps engineering mentoring as preferred
